zh.lifeSummary: 當Magery Danridge於1562年出生在英國素福爾可素德波利時，她的父親Nicholas Dandridge40歲，母親Margaret Joan Bert32歲。她於1584年與Thomas Ruggles在英國素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magery Danridge于1562年出生在英国素福爾可素德波利时，她的父亲Nicholas Dandridge40岁，母亲Margaret Joan Bert32岁。她于1584年与Thomas Ruggles在英国素福爾可素德波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Danridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Dundridge in Bishop's Waltham, Hampshire.

nameMeanings.name: Magery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Magery Danridge was born in 1562, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, her father, Nicholas Dandridge, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Joan Bert, was 32. She married Thomas Ruggles in 1584, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1603, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magery Danridge est née en 1562, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Dandridge, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Joan Bert, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Ruggles en 1584, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1603, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magery Danridge 1562 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Dandridge 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Joan Bert 32. Sie hat 1584 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England Thomas Ruggles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1603 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magery Danridge è nata il nel 1562 nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Nicholas Dandridge, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Joan Bert, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Ruggles nel 1584, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1603, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Magery Danridgeが1562年にイギリススフォルクスドブリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas Dandridgeは40歳，母Margaret Joan Bertは32歳であった。1584年にイギリススフォルクスドブリーでThomas Rugglesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magery Danridge(이)가 1562년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Dandridge(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Joan Bert(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1584년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Thomas Ruggles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magery Danridge nasceu em 1562, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Dandridge, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Joan Bert, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Ruggles em 1584, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1603, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magery Danridge родилась в 1562 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Dandridge было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Joan Bert, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Ruggles в 1584 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1603 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magery Danridge nació en 1562, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Dandridge, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Joan Bert, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thomas Ruggles en 1584, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1603, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
